query:
INSERT INTO chat_agent_skills (id, agent_id, skill_id, enabled)
               VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
               RETURNING id as "id!: Uuid",
                         agent_id as "agent_id!: Uuid",
                         skill_id as "skill_id!: Uuid",
                         enabled as "enabled!: bool",
                         created_at as "created_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
